ability.name: Scent
ability.description:
This pawn gains +1 Movement while an enemy pawn is within its line of sight.

Line of Sight: All spaces directly in front of this pawn up to the nearest allied pawn.

ability.name: Ethernal Flame
ability.description:
This pawn creates a Fire Area 2 spaces around itself. If an enemy pawn within the Fire Area does not move for 3 consecutive turns, it is captured and this pawn gains +1 Stack.

Each Stack increases the size of the Fire Area by +1 space. All accumulated Stacks are lost if this pawn is captured.

Fire Area: All spaces directly in front of and behind this pawn.

ability.name: Soul Harvest
ability.description:
Each pawn captured on the board grants +1 Soul, up to a maximum of 3/5/7 depending on the number of players.

When fully charged, this pawn gains an additional dice roll when moving.

The Soul stack resets when this pawn is captured.

ability.name: Toxic Shot
ability.description:
Shoots a poisoned dart at an enemy pawn anywhere on the board, inflicting Poison.

Poison: After 6 turns, the poisoned pawn is captured.
Poison can be cured by rolling a 6 on a dice. Curing consumes the turn.

ability.name: Fool's Immunity
ability.description:
This pawn is immune to all negative effects.

This pawn cannot capture enemy pawns.

ability.name: Charge!
ability.description:
This pawn charges in a straight line directly in front of it until it hits an enemy pawn or a corner of the board.

On Enemy Hit: Captures the enemy pawn and immediately ends the charge.
On Corner Hit: This pawn is Stunned for 1 turn.

ability.name: Teleport
ability.description:
Target any allied pawn anywhere on the board and swap positions with it.

Using this ability consumes this pawn's movement for the turn.

ability.name: Place trap
ability.description:
Places a hidden trap on the tile this pawn currently occupies. When an enemy pawn enters this tile, it is immediately captured, trap disappears and Trapper gets +1 Uses.

All of this pawn's active traps disappear if the Trapper is captured or enters the base.

ability.name: Backstab
ability.description:
Can be activated when Assassin is within enemy pawn's Line of Sight and within a 3-tile range.

Effect: Teleports this pawn directly to the first empty tile behind that enemy pawn.

ability.name: Starvation
ability.description:
Upon successfully entering an enemy base, instantly capture half of all active enemy pawns (rounded up).

Targets are chosen starting with the enemy pawns furthest advanced along the track.

ability.name: Call of the sea
ability.description:
This pawn creates a Deep Sea 5 spaces in each direction.

If an enemy is within the Deep Sea it will automatically move towards the Siren (also backwards) on the start of its Player's turn (this does not consume said Player's turn).

If a pawn reaches Siren in that manner it gets captured.
